zh.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William of Kinderton de Venables於1135年之後出生在英國爾金德頓時，他的父親Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton8883歲，母親Baroness Margery de Hatton19996歲。他於1169年與Agatha Veron Venne Devernon Devenne在英國英格蘭爾金德頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1188年被列為3rd baron of kinderton。他去世於大約1228年在英國爾金德頓。

zh-hans.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英国爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William of Kinderton de Venables于1135年之后出生在英国爾金德頓时，他的父亲Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton8883岁，母亲Baroness Margery de Hatton19996岁。他于1169年与Agatha Veron Venne Devernon Devenne在英国英格兰爾金德頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1188年被列为3rd baron of kinderton。他去世于大约1228年在英国爾金德頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William of Kinderton de Venables was born after 1135, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, his father, Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton, was 8883 and his mother, Baroness Margery de Hatton, was 19996. He married Agatha Veron Venne Devernon Devenne in 1169, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1188, his occupation is listed as 3rd baron of kinderton. He died about 1228, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William of Kinderton de Venables est né après 1135, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton, avait 8883 ans et sa mère, Baroness Margery de Hatton, avait 19996 ans. Il a épousé Agatha Veron Venne Devernon Devenne en 1169, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1188, sa profession de son indiquée est 3rd baron of kinderton. Il est décédé environ 1228, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William of Kinderton de Venables nach 1135 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton 8883 und seine Mutter Baroness Margery de Hatton 19996. Er hat 1169 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Agatha Veron Venne Devernon Devenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1188 ist sein Beruf als 3rd baron of kinderton aufgeführt. Er starb um 1228 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William of Kinderton de Venables è nato il dopo il 1135 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton, aveva 8883 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Margery de Hatton, aveva 19996 anni. Lui sposato Agatha Veron Venne Devernon Devenne nel 1169, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1188, la sua occupazione è indicata come 3rd baron of kinderton. Morì circa 1228, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England.

ja.Kinderton, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン
ja.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン クウム ハルメ
ja.lifeSummary: William of Kinderton de Venablesが1135年以後にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kindertonは8883歳，母Baroness Margery de Hattonは19996歳であった。1169年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでAgatha Veron Venne Devernon Devenneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1188年，職業は3rd baron of kindertonと記録されている。彼は約1228年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William of Kinderton de Venables(이)가 1135년 이후 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton(은)는 8883세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Margery de Hatton(은)는 19996세였다. 그는 1169년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 Agatha Veron Venne Devernon Devenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1188년, 그의 직업은 3rd baron of kinderton이었다. 그는 대략 1228년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William of Kinderton de Venables nasceu após 1135, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton, tinha 8883 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Margery de Hatton, tinha 19996 anos. Ele casou-se com Agatha Veron Venne Devernon Devenne em 1169, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1188, sua profissão aparece como 3rd baron of kinderton. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1228, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William of Kinderton de Venables родился после 1135 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton было 8883 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Margery de Hatton, 19996. Он женился на женщине по имени Agatha Veron Venne Devernon Devenne в 1169 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1188 году он работал по профессии 3rd baron of kinderton. Он умер около 1228 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия.

sm.after 1135–about 1228: ina ua ma'ea le 1135–e tusa o le 1228

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William of Kinderton de Venables nació después de 1135, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton, tenía 8883 años y su mamá, Baroness Margery de Hatton, tenía 19996 años. Se casó con Agatha Veron Venne Devernon Devenne en 1169, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1188, su ocupación registrada era 3rd baron of kinderton. Murió aproximadamente 1228, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
